name: Maison Internationale de l'Informatique S.A.S.
summary: Maison Internationale de l'Informatique S.A.S. provides professional training services in the fields of IT, office automation, management, and multimedia. It offers technical computer training; user office training; multimedia training; management training; and diploma courses. The company is based in Paris, France.
